name: Resistance
description: You touch one willing creature. Once before the spell ends, the target can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to one saving throw of its choice. It can roll the die before or after making the saving throw.
effect: Target gains a +1d4 bonus to one saving throw of their choice before the spell ends.
notes: Touch range; concentration up to 1 minute
Bonus applies to saving throws — not attack rolls or ability checks (compare Guidance)
